title: GeoLAB Metadata Finders: semantic search for SOEP variables and INKAR regional indicators
description: A research prototype for semantic discovery of research-data metadata. It searches SOEP-Core survey-variable metadata and INKAR regional indicators with a multilingual bi-encoder (bge-m3) and a multilingual cross-encoder reranker (bge-reranker; base by default), fused with a lexical and a dataset-authority signal, over German labels and English descriptions, with optional dataset / year / spatial-level / theme filters. Code only; no microdata is included or distributed.
